build.beforeDevCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f package.json ] && [ -f vite.config.ts ]; then npm run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort; else cd ../frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort; fi'
build.beforeBuildCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f package.json ] && [ -f vite.config.ts ]; then npm run build; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend run build; else cd ../frontend && npm run build; fi'

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
